The flood of Trump-fearing American liberals sneaking across the
border into Canada has intensified in the past week. The Republican
presidential campaign is prompting an exodus among left-leaning
Americans who fear they’ll soon be required to hunt, pray, pay taxes,
and live according to the Constitution.

Canadian border residents say it’s not uncommon to see dozens of
sociology professors, liberal arts majors, global-warming activists,
and “green” energy proponents crossing their fields at night.

“I went out to milk the cows the other day, and there was a Hollywood
producer huddled in the barn,” said southern Manitoba farmer Red
Greenfield, whose acreage borders North Dakota. “He was cold,
exhausted and hungry, and begged me for a latte and some free-range
chicken. When I said I didn’t have any, he left before I even got a
chance to show him my screenplay, eh?”

In an effort to stop the illegal aliens, Greenfield erected higher
fences, but the liberals scaled them. He then installed loudspeakers
that blared Rush Limbaugh across the fields, but they just stuck their
fingers in their ears and kept coming. Officials are particularly
concerned about smugglers who meet liberals just south of the border,
pack them into electric cars, and drive them across the border, where
they are simply left to fend for themselves after the battery dies.

“A lot of these people are not prepared for our rugged conditions,” an
Alberta border patrolman said. "I found one carload without a single
bottle of Perrier water, or any gemelli with shrimp and arugula. All
they had was a nice little Napa Valley cabernet and some kale chips.
When liberals are caught, they’re sent back across the border, often
wailing that they fear persecution from Trump high-hairers.

Rumors are circulating about plans being made to build re-education
camps where liberals will be forced to drink domestic beer, study the
Constitution, and find jobs that actually contribute to the economy.

In recent days, liberals have turned to ingenious ways of crossing the
border. Some have been disguised as senior citizens taking a bus trip
to buy cheap Canadian prescription drugs. After catching a half-dozen
young vegans in blue-hair wig disguises, Canadian immigration
authorities began stopping buses and quizzing the supposed senior
citizens about Perry Como and Rosemary Clooney to prove that they were
alive in the '50s.

“If they can’t identify the accordion player on The Lawrence Welk
Show, we become very suspicious about their age,” an official said.

Canadian citizens have complained that the illegal immigrants are
creating an organic-broccoli shortage, are buying up all the Barbara
Streisand CD’s, and are overloading the internet while downloading
jazzercise apps to their cell phones.

“I really feel sorry for American liberals, but the Canadian economy
just can’t support them,” an Ottawa resident said. "After all, how
many art-history majors does one country need?

Aquamarine, mos i beso te gjitha gjerave qe flet korenti (TM Lizander). Ai deri para 1 muaji po thonte do te votoje Hillary por nderkohe bente fushate per Trump. Nuk ka ndaluar njeri ne Amerike te thote Gezuar Krishtlindjet. Absurditete te tilla sajohen vec nga ekstremistet e djathte, ekstremistet fetare te krishtere. Shiko me lart cfare kam shkruar.

Sezoni i “festave” ne Amerike, ne menyre jo zyrtare, fillon cdo vit e me pare. Nuk mjafton 24 dhe 25 Dhjetori. Duke patur parasysh qe eshte shnderruar ne nje sezon te madh komercial, bizneset perpiqen ta mjelin sa me shume. Nuk ka me vetem 2 dite, madje s’ka as 12 Days of Christmas (sipas kenges). Zakonisht ishim mesuar te fillonte mbas festes se Thanksgiving por tani ka dyqane qe fillojne zbukurimet dhe mallrat e “Christmas” qysh ne Shtator! Mos te flasim per ato biznese qe bejne dhe promovime te tipit “Christmas in July”. Radiot (s’po flas per ato te krishtera se ato dihen) fillojne kenget e krishtlindjeve qysh per Halloween. Dhe ekstremistet e krishtere ankohen per diskriminim nderkohe qe kudo jemi te rrethuar nga Krishtlindjet. Thjesht duan te ankohen per dicka. Nga njera ane shoket e bardhe te korentit hiqen si mbrojtes te biznesit dhe nga ana tjeter qurraviten pse Starbucks nuk ka zbukuruar gotat prej letre me kryqe.

Sic thashe me siper, ngaqe “sezoni” zgjat kaq shume, ka dhe festa te tjera qe bien ne kete kohe - jo vetem fetare te feve te tjera por dhe Thanksgiving dhe Vitin e Ri. Bizneset per t’i rene shkurt qe mos te bejne signs dhe reklama per cdo feste, kane zgjedhur pergjithesuesen “Happy Holidays” per te gjithe sezonin. Po ashtu dhe njerezit, se nuk e dine nese tjetri eshte i krishtere apo hebre apo ateist dhe s’duan te ofendojne.

Kjo eshte e verteta jo ekstreme. Askush nuk ka ndaluar askend qe te uroje Merry Christmas.

Une kam ardhur ne SHBA qe ne 1996 dhe atehere pershendetej:
Merry Christmas!
Dhe per vitin e ri
A happy New Year!
Edhe atehere sezoni i festave fillonte qe qe pas Halloween.
Happy Holiday filloi ne qytetet liberale si San Francisco dhe Boston nga komuniteti LGBT.
Ne fillim hoqen urimin Merry Christmas ne pemen e Krishtlindjeve,qe bejne bashkite.
Ato qytete qe nuk u binden I cuan ne gjyq dhe me kete u fshi urimi.
Pastaj nga frika e fshiu urimin edhe Bushi nga pema e Krishtlindjeve e Shtepise se Bardhe.
Pastaj ju sulen bizneseve duke i kercenuar se do ti hidhnin ne gjyq nese nuk e nderronin pershendetjen ne Happy Holidays!
Kuptohet qe bizneset nuk I kane qef gjyqet dhe menjehere e kthyen pershendetjen e tyre nga Merry Christmas ne Happy Holiday per te kenaqur pakicen e zhurmshme…

Mos genje kaq hapur more zoteri, se bizneset deri ne 2002 operonin per bukuri me sezonin e festave me Merry. Christmas.
Nejse ajo kohe iku.
Sot mu be qefi kur shkova ne Marshalls dhe pashe Merry Christmas perseri.
